target_flow: Send and read messages in Grok desktop app (via WebCatalog)

navigation_plan.note: Get window position and size for coordinate calculation
Click on the input field at bottom center of window
Set clipboard via interactive PowerShell session — must use runPSRawInteractive, not cmd.exe Set-Clipboard
Verify text appeared in input before sending
Wait for Grok to finish responding — Grok is slower than ChatGPT
Screenshot to read response — Ctrl+A does NOT work in Grok

known_issues: Tab key goes to attachment button, NOT the input field — never use Tab
SendKeys strips spaces — must use clipboard paste instead
Ctrl+A selects nothing in Grok — cannot use /copy endpoint, use screenshot instead
Set-Clipboard via cmd.exe does not affect desktop session — must use runPSRawInteractive with System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard
WebCatalog wrapper — Grok runs inside WebCatalog which adds extra chrome
